text: Diagnósticos médicos e decisões jurídicas: o papel da IA. A justiça e a Medicina são considerados campos de alto risco. Neles é mais urgente do que em qualquer outra área estabelecer sistemas para que os humanos tenham sempre a decisão final. Os especialistas em IA trabalham para garantir a confiança dos usuários, para que o sistema seja transparente, que proteja as pessoas e que os humanos estejam no centro das decisões.

summary: Medical diagnoses and legal decisions: the role of AI. Justice and Medicine are considered high-risk fields where it is crucial to establish systems ensuring humans retain final decision-making authority. AI experts aim to build systems that are transparent, protective of individuals, and centered on human decision-making.

text: One morning, when Gregor Samsa woke from troubled dreams, he found himself transformed in his bed into a horrible vermin. He lay on his armour-like back, and if he lifted his head a little he could see his brown belly, slightly domed and divided by arches into stiff sections. The bedding was hardly able to cover it and seemed ready to slide off any moment. His many legs, pitifully thin compared with the size of the rest of him, waved about helplessly as he looked. What's happened to me? he thought. It wasn't a dream. His room, a proper human room although a little too small, lay peacefully between its four familiar walls. A collection of textile samples lay spread out on the table - Samsa was a travelling salesman - and above it there hung a picture that he had recently cut out of an illustrated magazine and housed in a nice, gilded frame. It showed a lady fitted out with a fur hat and fur boa who sat upright, raising a heavy fur muff that covered the whole of her lower arm towards the viewer. Gregor then turned to look out the window at the dull weather.
summary: Gregor Samsa acorda um dia de pesadelos e se encontra transformado em um verme na cama. Seu quarto, apesar de pequeno, parece tranquilamente familiar. Ele notou uma coleção de amostras de tecidos e uma foto de uma senhora com capa e muff de pele. Ao olhar pela janela, o tempo parece entediante e cinzento.
